Name: Dave's Special LITEish V3.61 (MEV+DEA+CD2) R6
Description:
------------------
   VERSION: 3.61 R4
  ------------------

  * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *
  *** BOTH HOST AND CLIENTS REQUIRE CD2 UPDATE 18 or NEWER  ***
  ***            AND THE CORRECT MEV/DEA VERSION            ***
  * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *

  PLEASE DOUBLE CHECK YOUR PAKS BEFORE REPORTING AN ISSUE
  -------------------------------------------------------
  Clients without CD2 update 18 (or newer) will see desync or crash.
  Clients without MEVv5_4 (or newer) will have invisible enemies.
  Clients without DEA_b00.3.3 (or newer) will have invisible enemies.
  
  Dave's Special with true 5.5x2 difficulty settings and slightly increased WaveSpawner timer.
  + ~10% EnemyCountModifier and + ~50% more stationary compared to LITE

R4
- Trash Lobber & Trash Breeder Exploders have normal exploder materials for more visibility
- Fortifier changes (Grunt and Spitter)
  - Glowing material for buffed enemies removed
  - Scale for buffed enemies reduced from 1.2 > 1.1
  - Scale for fortifiers upped from 1.3 > 1.4
  - Added bouncers to Spitter Fortifier's buffed enemies
- TimeDilated Trash Lobber (0.8 > 0.7)
- TimeDilated Snowballer (1 > 0.8)
- TimeDilated Mini Bulk Shooter (0.9 > 0.7)
- Big Bulk renamed Moderately Large Bulk, carve 30M > 22M
- Fixed DisplayName for Mactera Spawns from Trash Breeders
- Goomba StaggerDurationMultiplier (1 > 2), StaggerImmunityWindow (1 > 0.5), Speed reduced (0.8 > 0.6)

R5
- Boss bar breeders heal changed from -5 to -25 when EnemyDistance >= 35m from the closest player
- Mactera Mothership time between eggs upped (2 > 3)

R6
- All Mini Bulks:
  - Explosion DamageRadius redcued to 7.5m, allowing you to escape the blast radius without dash
  - All carve set to 0
- Mini bulks are replaced with custom vets with equal chance
  - Mini Bulks
  - Mini Mini Bulk Spawninators
  - Mini Trashinators
  - Mini Exploder Hosts
  - Mini Ice Bulks
